arts.ttl: West Ham’s Lucas Paqueta confident over betting trial – ‘Best in the sports world’ lawyer on the case
arts.sum: West Ham United star Lucas Paquetá is confident of being acquitted of charges labelled against him and not being banned for life. That’s according to journalist Fabrício Lopes, from the O Dia portal and the Resenha Rubro-Negra channel via Bolavip, who says the West Ham midfielder’s defence are confident they can avoid being sanctioned.
